hero.desc: 5 years of experience in full-stack development. I combine technical expertise and a human approach to build high-performance, tailor-made applications.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Passionate full-stack developer with 5 years of experience, I help clients bring their digital projects to life, from design to production.
about.p2: What sets me apart? A human-centered approach. I firmly believe that good communication and active listening are just as important as technical skills. My goal: to create solutions that truly meet your needs, while remaining maintainable and scalable.
about.card1_desc: Mastery of modern technologies and best practices
about.card3_desc: Easy integration into your teams and processes

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.fullstack_desc: From React components to Elixir APIs, I cover the full application stack to deliver complete products.
skills.ai_desc: RAG pipeline setup, AI API integration (OpenAI, Anthropic…), orchestration with LangChain and workflow automation with n8n.
skills.infra_desc: Database design, containerization and CI/CD pipelines for reliable deployments.
skills.archi_desc: System design, API design, testing and best practices for maintainable code in the long run.

beta_order_capture.description: Development of a full-featured platform for managing orders and selling custom clothing.
beta_order_capture.context_text: Beta Vêtements is a custom clothing company. The goal was to replace a manual ordering process (emails, spreadsheets) with a centralized platform allowing customers to place orders directly online.
features: Product catalog with variant management (size, color, customization)
Cart and checkout with real-time stock validation
Admin interface for product and order management
Redis cache for catalog performance

technical.name: Angular
technical.desc: modular structure suited for a complex business application

technical.name: MongoDB
technical.desc: flexible schema for products with highly heterogeneous variants

technical.name: Redis
technical.desc: catalog caching to avoid repeated database queries

technical.name: Node.js / Express
technical.desc: lightweight REST API consistent with the full-stack JS ecosystem

pricing.label: Supplier image integration and performance optimization
Placement designer for custom clothing preview
Mailing and alerting through company channels

beta_order_capture.pricing_note: This is an indicative estimate, it might not be applicable to your project due to technical details.

volley_team_optimizer.description: Project to generate balanced volleyball teams for recreational sessions in volleyball clubs
volley_team_optimizer.context_text: In recreational volleyball sessions, manually forming balanced teams is time-consuming and often produces uneven results. VTO automates this distribution by taking each player's level into account.
volley_team_optimizer.context_collab: Project co-developed with <anchor>Baptiste Anorga</anchor> (who is much more knowledgeable in volleyball than me).
features: Input of present players with their skill level
Automatic generation of balanced teams
Ability to manually adjust the distribution
Simple and fast mobile interface usable directly on the court

technical.name: Standalone Angular
technical.desc: lightweight project with no backend, deployed as static files

technical.name: Distribution algorithm
technical.desc: level-based distribution with randomization to vary team compositions

volley_team_optimizer.pricing_note: This is an indicative estimate, it might not be applicable to your project due to technical details.

guillaume_galland.description: Showcase website for Guillaume Galland, an independent contractor in the construction sector
guillaume_galland.context_text: Guillaume Galland is an independent consultant in the construction sector. He needed a professional online presence to showcase his services and make it easier for new clients to get in touch.
features: Presentation of offered services
Portfolio of completed work
Contact form
Clean and responsive design

technical.name: React
technical.desc: simple and fast stack for a showcase site with no need for a complex backend

guillaume_galland.pricing_note: This is an indicative estimate, it might not be applicable to your project due to technical details.

showcase_site.title: Showcase Website
showcase_site.description: Design and development of a modern, fast and responsive showcase website to present your business, services and make it easy for prospects to get in touch.
showcase_site.context_text: Designed for freelancers, craftsmen, consultants and small businesses who need a professional online presence without the complexity of an e-commerce platform. The goal: a site that inspires trust, loads fast, ranks well on Google and converts visitors into contact requests.
features: Custom design, responsive mobile/tablet/desktop
Home page, about, services, portfolio/case studies, contact
Contact form with secure email delivery
Basic SEO optimization (meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap, hreflang if multilingual)
Static prerendering for optimal load times
GDPR compliance (privacy policy, consent management)
Deployment and go-live on the hosting of your choice

technical.name: React + Vite
technical.desc: modern, lightweight and performant stack for a fast-loading showcase site

technical.name: Tailwind CSS
technical.desc: consistent and maintainable design system, easy theme updates

technical.name: SSG (prerendering)
technical.desc: static HTML generated at build time, excellent for SEO and speed

technical.name: i18n (optional)
technical.desc: multilingual FR/EN support if needed, with routing and hreflang

showcase_site.pricing_note: Indicative price. Final cost depends on the number of pages, the branding work involved and any specific integrations.
showcase_site.example_text: Take a look at a showcase site recently delivered for Guillaume Galland, an independent professional in the construction industry.

ecommerce_site.title: E-commerce Site
ecommerce_site.description: Custom-built online store to sell your products or services, with a smooth checkout, secure payments, and the day-to-day integrations you actually need.
ecommerce_site.context_text: Built for merchants, artisans, creators and freelancers who want to sell online without being locked into a rigid platform or paying a commission on every sale forever. The goal: a fast, reliable, compliant store (VAT, GDPR, T&Cs), well-indexed, and that integrates cleanly with your day-to-day tools (accounting, shipping, ERP). Whether you're launching your first store or migrating from Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix or a marketplace, we scope the project together to focus on what actually delivers value.
features: Product catalog with variants (size, color, options) and stock management
Checkout funnel optimized for desktop & mobile, guest checkout or customer account
Secure payments (cards, Apple/Google Pay, PayPal, installment payments as needed)
Shipping management (Colissimo, Mondial Relay, Chronopost, click & collect, digital delivery)
Multi-currency, VAT handling (multiple rates, intra-EU, outside EU)
Promo codes, customer reviews, newsletter, abandoned cart recovery — based on your priorities
Accounting and shipping integrations (Sendcloud / Boxtal) and marketplace sync if needed
Migration from your current platform (products, customers, orders, SEO redirects)
Base SEO, GDPR compliance, legal notice and T&Cs
Deployment, go-live and post-launch support

technical.name: Stack matched to the project
technical.desc: Shopify, WooCommerce, Prestashop or custom development — chosen with you based on volume, integrations and the team that will take over.

ecommerce_site.pricing_note: Indicative price. The final cost depends on the chosen platform, the number of products, the integrations (accounting, shipping, ERP) and any migration from an existing platform.

cv.profile_text: I am a curious person, always looking for new things to learn and explore. I have a proactive mindset and enjoy understanding things holistically, which allows me to develop skills in fields beyond my initial training. I am looking for a freelance mission starting early April 2026.

banner.text: This site only uses preference cookies (language, theme) — no advertising tracker or analytics tool.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Florian Batard, acting as a self-employed micro-entrepreneur (the "Controller"), collects and processes personal data through this website, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.

sections.title: Data Controller
paragraphs: Florian Batard, self-employed micro-entrepreneur — SIRET TODO_SIRET — 27 rue Léon Frot, Paris, 75011.
Contact: batard.florian.pro@gmail.com.

sections.title: Purposes of processing
paragraphs: Your data is collected through the site's forms for two specific purposes:
items: Contact form: respond to your request and discuss a possible project with you.
"Showcase site" brief form: study your project, prepare a quote and get back to you.

sections.title: Legal bases
paragraphs: Processing is based on two legal grounds defined by the GDPR:
items: Your consent (Article 6.1.a) — explicitly collected via a checkbox before sending the form.
The performance of pre-contractual measures taken at your request (Article 6.1.b) — you contact us with a view to a possible commercial relationship.

sections.title: Data collected
paragraphs: Depending on the form used, the following data may be collected:
items: Content of the message or brief: project description, expectations, visual preferences, attached files (logo, photos), domain name, etc.
No special category data within the meaning of Article 9 of the GDPR is collected.

sections.title: Recipients
paragraphs: Data is intended exclusively for the Controller and is neither sold nor transferred to third parties for commercial purposes. Submissions are received both by email and stored in a database hosted on the Controller's infrastructure.

sections.title: Hosting and processors
paragraphs: The quick contact form is processed via Formspree (https://formspree.io), acting as a processor for message delivery. The brief form is processed by a backend hosted by the Controller. No analytics tool or advertising tracker is used.

sections.title: Retention period
paragraphs: Form data is kept for the time needed to process your request, then for a maximum of 3 years from our last contact, in accordance with the CNIL's recommendations on commercial prospecting. After this period, data is deleted or anonymised.

sections.title: Cookies and local storage
paragraphs: The site does not use any advertising cookie or analytics tool. Only cookies and local storage entries strictly necessary for ease of use are employed:
items: "lang" cookie and localStorage: stores the chosen language (duration: 1 year).
"cookie-info-dismissed" localStorage: stores the fact that you closed the cookie information banner.
"showcase_form_draft" localStorage: temporary save (7 days) of your showcase brief draft, automatically removed after submission.
"ecommerce_form_draft" localStorage: temporary save (7 days) of your e-commerce brief draft, automatically removed after submission.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights over your data:
items: Right of access, rectification and erasure.
Right to restriction and to object to processing.
Right to withdraw your consent at any time.
Right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).

sections.title: Exercising your rights
paragraphs: To exercise any of these rights, contact the Controller by email at batard.florian.pro@gmail.com. A response will be provided within a maximum of one month.

sections.title: Site editor
paragraphs: Florian Batard, self-employed micro-entrepreneur.
SIRET: TODO_SIRET.
Address: 27 rue Léon Frot, Paris, 75011
Email: batard.florian.pro@gmail.com.

sections.title: Publication director
paragraphs: Florian Batard.

sections.title: Hosting
paragraphs: Frontend: self-hosted by the editor at the subdomain fbatard.fr.
Backend (forms): self-hosted by the editor at the subdomain site-perso-back.home.fbatard.fr.

sections.title: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All the content on this site (texts, images, logos, source code, design) is the exclusive property of Florian Batard, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation, is prohibited and constitutes infringement under articles L.335-2 et seq. of the French Intellectual Property Code.

sections.title: Personal data
paragraphs: How personal data is collected and processed is described in the privacy policy accessible from the footer.

sections.title: Contact
paragraphs: For any question about the site, contact batard.florian.pro@gmail.com.
